title: Use IME for input
text: Use IME for input Use the language-specific input mode in the Input Method Editor. Value Description Undefined Defaults to the YIME field syntax code. True Sets the YIME field syntax code, which specifies the language-specific mode. False Sets the NIME field syntax code, which specifies the direct input mode. Description Switch to the language-specific input mode in the Input Method Editor when focus moves to this string field. Applies To Modeled Field Syntax Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
